The '''Class-E cargo container''' was an angular hemispherical freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. [[Modular conveyor]] [[Transport/Legends|transports]] were specially designed to carry four Class-E containers; a pair of the containers flanked the main body of the [[Starship/Legends|craft]] on port and starboard.<ref name="XWA" />
